item.title: AroundTheNFL: Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 3min In his second mock of the 2026 NFL Draft, @MBandNFL projects the Steelers and Eagl
item.description:
Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 3min In his second mock of the 2026 NFL Draft, @MBandNFL projects the Steelers and Eagles will both add receivers to the roster. Meanwhile, the Cowboys upgrade multiple levels of the defense. Check out the full first-round forecast, 1-32.
https:// nfl.com/news/mike-band -2026-nfl-mock-draft-2-0-cowboys-take-rueben-bain-jr-steelers-and-eagles-select-receivers?campaign=Twitter_atn … 1 2 1 mil
